description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mas, Mob

This technique is learned for a specific stance, and can only be used while in the stance it was learned for. It can be learned multiple times, choosing a different stance to apply it to each time. You gain a +2 competence bonus to the Learn check if you learn this technique while you already know it. Mastery applies only to a single instance of the technique: it must be learned separately for each stance.

You make a convincing feint, provoking an attack of opportunity from the target against which you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Defense. If the target misses, you may make an attack of opportunity against them.

Mastery: Each step lowers the armor check penalty of your worn armor by 1 when determining the chance to fail to perform this technique.

The first, third and fifth steps each increase the circumstance bonus to Defense by +1.
